tagline: AI Runtime now supports the 1xH100 accelerator in Beta.
what_it_does: AI Runtime now supports the 1xH100 accelerator in Beta. Public Preview AI Runtime for single node tasks is in Public Preview. The distributed training API for multi GPU workloads remain in Beta.
why_it_matters: You can use AI Runtime to train and fine tune custom models using your favorite frameworks and get state of the art efficiency, performance, and quality.
plain_summary: AI Runtime now supports the 1xH100 accelerator in Beta. Public Preview AI Runtime for single node tasks is in Public Preview.
key_takeaway: AI Runtime now supports the 1xH100 accelerator in Beta.
